name: Wobbly Boxing 3D
description: Wobbly Boxing 3D is a fun and unique boxing game that puts you in the ring against a CPU opponent or a friend in two-player mode. Unlike traditional boxing games, the characters in Wobbly Boxing 3D are made up of multiple spheres, giving them a wobbly and playful appearance. Have fun.
instructions: Use WASD or arrow keys to walk left click or F key to left punch right click or G key to right punch Both mouse buttons or T key to break opponents guard
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 3D Games, Adventure, Arcade, Boxing, Fight, Fighting, Skill, Sport
